needed_metrics.name: Gradient_Signal_Coherence (GSC)
needed_metrics.definition: Cosine similarity of gradient directions across the B4 layer-stack.

needed_metrics.name: Attention_Head_Agreement (AHA)
needed_metrics.definition: Mutual information between attention heads in the same block.
needed_metrics.critical_threshold: > 0.8 indication of redundancy; < 0.2 indicates B3 desync

needed_metrics.name: Jacobian_Spectral_Norm (JSN)
needed_metrics.definition: Measure of B2 volumetric expansion vs B1 basin depth.

reasoning: We need these to transform the qualitative 'B3 coordination' into a formal numeric basis coordinate for v1.1 of the LLM audit.
